title: This Girl, That Girl, and the Other One

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days after Matikanetannhauser's debut...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Trainer! SOS! Mayday!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uh... Well, it's... Just turn on the TV!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I do as she says and fumble the TV on to find...

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
We're interviewing Umamusume who debuted this
year! Today, we're featuring someone who
showed amazing skill in her debut race—Mihono
Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Bourbon's really running on TV!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I mean I heard she got interviewed, but
isn't this cool?! And I debuted around the same
time as her! I'm so proud of her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People at Chukyo Racecourse, where Mihono
Bourbon made her debut, are raving about her
talent.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
She had a late start, but got all the way to first on
that straight! It seriously sent shivers down my
spine!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Her legs seem so strong. I'm sure she'll just keep
getting better and better.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
You're the big new star of the season! Could you
tell us exactly what your goals are for the Twinkle
Series?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: My only goal is to win the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I see! Not to be rude, but that's rather surprising
to hear. I thought you would be more interested
in sprints...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I may be more suited for sprints, but that does
not matter. My goal is the Triple Crown and my
decision is final.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon declares her goal calmly and
confidently in front of the camera.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That was so cool! Bourbon really is
something else!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh. But if she's on the Triple Crown Tour, that
means we'll be racing each other, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh my!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, the same show is playing on the TV in
the dorm lobby.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
Next up, we'll be covering Umamusume in their
classic and senior years!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I bet I know which two they'll talk about.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
One has been hailed as the strongest stayer
around—Mejiro McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
And the other is the prodigy who's yet to lose a
race, including both the Japanese Derby and the
Satsuki Sho—Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hah. Sure enough...

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
We've got all of the A-listers here! I hope we get
a chance to see them clash someday.

text_block_list.name: Racing Expert
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. However, Tokai Teio's injury directly
following the Derby was most unfortunate.

text_block_list.name: Racing Expert
text_block_list.text:
I believe they said it will take her about six
months to recover and that she won't be running
in the Kikuka Sho. It's a shame because the Triple
Crown would have been a sure thing.

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Many people were hoping to see a
new Triple Crown champion. I'm personally also
disappointed she won't be running.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: If she could run, it would've been a sure thing...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah... That's probably true...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Muuun! I ran my heart out today! Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh. Is that... Nature over there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Matikanetannhauser's gaze to find Nice
Nature gazing at the track with a gloomy
expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well... She's actually been like that for a few days
now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I'm a bit worried...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go talk to her real quick!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let me guess. You're feeling a bit blue because
you drew a modest fortune today?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But it's okay! The name of today's lucky Uma
starts with "M" and ends with "R." If you talk to
her, you'll be happy again in no time!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's gotten into you all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: U-um... I'm just pretending to be Fuku!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
For a limited time only, this lucky Umamusume is
willing to hear out any problem.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Just trying to lighten the mood.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pffft! That's so—what the heck?! Haha.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Thanks for the laugh. And sorry for worrying you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But would an Umamusume whose name starts with
"M" and ends with "R" actually be willing to listen
to me for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The thing is... I've wanted to run in the Kikuka
Sho for a while now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Originally, it was Tokai Teio who made me want
to enter. I figured I'd give it a try and got really
into my training.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But then I saw that segment on how upset
everyone was about the fact that Teio isn't
running in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You know how that expert said the Triple Crown
would've been a sure thing for her if she ran? I
couldn't believe they said something like that!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Teio knows that better than anyone! But
she can't run.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ever since she was little, she had her heart set on
being the invincible Triple Crown champion. She
worked so hard for it, and now it's impossible!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even though she's probably feeling crushed, all
these people are saying irresponsible stuff like
that about her... It's gotta be tough... it has to be.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...And on top of that, whoever does end up
winning the Kikuka Sho will probably have to hear
that drivel too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
People will say she only won because Teio wasn't
there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Just for argument's sake, let's say that I won for
example. I'm sure I'd be ecstatic.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But there'd always be this footnote saying it was
because Teio wasn't there...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I can't believe I'm saying this before I even
run. But my mind just keeps wandering to all this
pointless stuff...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I'm so lame!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I should be putting everything I've got into
training right now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser gazes kindly at Nice Nature
as she hangs her head.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What would you do in this situation, Tannhauser?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? Me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well... I think I'd be thinking the same thing
you are.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I mean, that would bother anyone. I'm sure I'd
mull it over too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But despite all of that, I think there would always
be some part of me that just simply wanted to win
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So... Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You just have to win so convincingly that no one
will even compare you to Teio.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think that's your only option! You gotta
win by a landslide...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So that everyone forgets about Teio completely!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uh... Did you hear what I said?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence falls over them suddenly. The two of them
stare at each other, until...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hah! Haha, ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Did I say something funny?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Geez! I should've known—that's exactly the kind of person you are... But thanks, you've given me exactly the wake-up call I needed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta keep my head up and keep moving
forward. I'm not gonna get anywhere moping
around like this.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. I'm gonna win. It's going to be a blowout.
It's totally possible.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure exactly what's going on, but you feel
better, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, definitely... Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Pheeew! All riiiight! So how about it? Wanna run
into the setting sun?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha! Not a chance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them joke around while they walk
back to the academy together. The sun may be
setting, but Nice Nature seems a little brighter.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
"Even if you don't shine as bright as the sun,
you've got a weapon no one else has! You have
the power to take someone's hand and give them
the push they need!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I almost can hear Director Akikawa's
words from that day ringing in the air.
